summary_draft: The current best hypothesis still holds, but the next run should isolate session age from principal drift with an explicit healthcheck path.

evidence_candidates.title: Codex auth and session handling notes
evidence_candidates.extraction_note: Documentation distinguishes continuity signals from verified principal inspection.

claims.text: A scheduled run must not proceed when session inspection cannot verify both principal identity and workspace policy.

arguments.rationale: Fail-closed handling preserves backend ownership guarantees when credentials drift.

challenger_hypotheses.title: Allow warning-only stale session handling
challenger_hypotheses.statement: If account/read and config/read succeed, stale-session handling may defer renewal without blocking the run.

conflict_assessments.summary: More validation is needed to separate recoverable staleness from security-relevant identity drift.

revision_proposals.rationale: The current evidence supports stricter run gating until the healthcheck path is validated.

next_actions.description: Compare stale-session outcomes against successful account/read verification in the next scheduled validation run.
